M-035.NAME: portable-data-backup
M-035.owns: Portable backup/restore contract for PostgreSQL data, runtime secrets, AWG state, device-client linkage, and integrity manifests

exports.artifact-postgres-dump: Durable dump of users, subscriptions, payments, devices, VPN clients, audit events, and migrations state
exports.artifact-runtime-secrets: Protected copy of .env and required deployment secrets without log exposure
exports.artifact-vpn-state: AWG profile, server keys, peer state, subnet settings, and client linkage needed for restore
exports.artifact-restore-manifest: Checksums, creation timestamp, schema version, and item counts for restore verification

constraints.constraint-1: Secrets, tokens, passwords, and private keys must not be printed in command output or logs.
constraints.constraint-2: Restore validation must compare counts and checksums before cutover.
constraints.constraint-3: Existing client configs must not be silently invalidated unless operator explicitly chooses rotation.

M-035.hotspot: H-022: Backup bundles can expose secrets or fail restore if they omit AWG profiles, runtime env, or device/client linkage
